testcase.name: test_extract_fields_doc

failure.message: AssertionError: unexpected confidence: low assert 'low' in ('medium', 'high') + where 'low' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfb7c9bdc29b0>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfb7c9bdc29b0> = 'low'.lower + where 'low' = str('low')

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_v93_features.py:71: in test_extract_fields_doc assert str(conf).lower() in ("medium", "high"), f"unexpected confidence: {conf}" E AssertionError: unexpected confidence: low E assert 'low' in ('medium', 'high') E + where 'low' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfb7c9bdc29b0>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfb7c9bdc29b0> = 'low'.lower E + where 'low' = str('low')
